reviews.text: The best burger I’ve ever had! Everything was perfect – hot, fresh, juicy, and full of flavour. Easily a 10/10. I’ll definitely be ordering again. Highly recommended!
The food is normal very good, but fries this time was old fries and it really show. The burger was very good. The fries was definitely not acceptable this time.
This is one of my favourite takeaways. Always amazing tasting food and arrives hot and well packaged. 10/10 from me

Delicious & fresh food! Would 100% order from here again. The beef burger was delicious! The bulgogi  sauce was lovely but a lil spicy. The honey soy burger was definitely full of umami flavour! Thank you so much for the free drink too!

Pretty decent burger, the bun was fresh and patties well cooked.
Would have preferred a little more sauce in the burger and some grilled onions
